summary: All login walls successfully removed from public browsing. All 7 features tested and passing: Public remedies page loads without login, homepage topic cards navigate to /topic/:id (NOT /login), public topic landing page shows full content with tiers and pricing, all homepage nav links point to /topics, /experts, /remedies (public routes), PublicNavHeader links correctly to /remedies, expert cards navigate to /experts/:expertId, and 'Start my journey' correctly redirects to /login.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ PublicRemediesPage correctly shows all remedy categories (Healing Programs, Poojas, Gemstones, Wellness Kits, Rituals)
✓ Remedies data is hardcoded as noted - MOCKED DATA (not from API)
✓ Homepage topic cards correctly use slugs (career_clarity, stress_management, marriage_planning, relationship_healing)
✓ handleBeginConsultation uses window.location.href to navigate to /topic/:topicId instead of onLoginClick
✓ All nav links in PublicLandingPage point to public routes: /topics, /experts, /remedies
✓ Expert cards on /experts page use navigate() to go to /experts/:expertId
✓ View Profile buttons on homepage expert cards navigate to /experts page
✓ 'Start my journey' button on PublicTopicLandingPage correctly stores intent and redirects to /login
✓ Mobile navigation in PublicLandingPage also uses correct public routes
context_for_next_testing_agent: All login walls removed from public browsing. Users can now freely browse /topics, /experts, /remedies, and individual /topic/:topicId pages without logging in. Login is only required when clicking 'Start my journey' to proceed to checkout. Remedies data is HARDCODED (not from API).

public_remedies_page.category_filters: PASS - All Remedies, Poojas categories found
public_remedies_page.public_nav_header: PASS - Life Topics, Experts, Remedies links present

mocked_data_note: Remedies data is HARDCODED in PublicRemediesPage.jsx (REMEDIES constant), not fetched from API
